steps.title: Explain the accuracy gap
steps.content: The passage says Chen's 2015 calculation was more accurate than the 1920 calculation. The next sentence explains why that difference is unsurprising: the older calculation used only cardboard and string.

steps.title: Reject transition mismatches
steps.content: A signals a final outcome, C signals similarity, and D signals purpose. The needed transition marks an expected explanation. The answer is B.
